title: clk's Default 1.8.9
description: Simple 1.8 texture pack based around modern minecraft textures.
body:
###
clk's Default 1.8.9
This pack is a refined version of the default Minecraft textures, adjusted to match **my** visual preferences while preserving the original vanilla style. --- ###
What this pack does
Ports most textures from 1.14 to 1.8.9, giving the textures more modern look.
Modified textures (click to expand) **Weapons** - Swords - Held item visuals **Blocks** - Wool textures - Ore textures - Selected block adjustments **Environment** - Rain - Clouds - Snow **Overlays** - Underwater overlay - Pumpkin overlay **Animations** - Blockhit animation **GUI** - Hearts - Hotbar - Buttons - Icons
--- ###
Note:
Texture pack tested on versions (click to expand) - 1.8.9 - 1.7.10
If a texture looks outdated, inconsistent, or visually off, it will likely be redesigned in future updates. (if i ever decide to update an texturepack)
